pkgcache.description: Change user id or become root [sudo-rs]
notes: Built From Source (Latest Git HEAD). Check/Report @ https://github.com/trifectatechfoundation/sudo-rs

Also requires PAM to be setup: https://github.com/trifectatechfoundation/sudo-rs#differences-from-original-sudo
